zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon是Alexander Gordon和Janet Grant的女兒，於大約1503年出生在英國蘇格蘭。她和Thomas Cumming of Altyre至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon是Alexander Gordon和Janet Grant的女儿，于大约1503年出生在英国苏格兰。她和Thomas Cumming of Altyre至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Gordon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Gordon in Berwickshire, named with Welsh gor ‘spacious’ + din ‘fort’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Gourdon in Saône-et-Loire, so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Gordus + the locative suffix -o, -ōnis.
English (of Norman origin): alternatively, said to be a nickname from a diminutive of Old French gourd ‘heavy, dull, sluggish’ (compare 8 below).

variants.name: Gordin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eyal, Moisey, Yakov, Zalman, Erez, Faina, Haya, Mendel.  Russian Leonid, Aleksandr, Boris, Feiga, Genady.
French: variant of   Gourdin  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Gordan
meanings: German: variant of Jordan . The surname Gordan is very rare in Germany.
Irish (Wexford and Sligo): adopted as an Anglicized form of Mag Mhuirneacháin ‘son of Muirneachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of muirneach ‘lovable’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon was born about 1503, in Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alexander Gordon and Janet Grant. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Thomas Cumming of Altyre. She died in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon est née environ 1503, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Alexander Gordon et Janet Grant. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Thomas Cumming of Altyre. Elle est décédée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon wurde um 1503 in Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Alexander Gordon und Janet Grant geboren. Sie hatte mit Thomas Cumming of Altyre mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon è nata il circa 1503 nel Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Alexander Gordon e Janet Grant. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Thomas Cumming of Altyre. Morì nel Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordonは約1503年にイギリススコットランドでAlexander GordonとJanet Grantの娘として生まれた。彼女はThomas Cumming of Altyreとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はスコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon(은)는 대략 1503년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Alexander Gordon(와)과 Janet Grant의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Cumming of Altyre(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon nasceu aproximadamente 1503, em Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Alexander Gordon e Janet Grant. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Thomas Cumming of Altyre. Ela faleceu em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon родилась около 1503 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Alexander Gordon и Janet Grant. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Thomas Cumming of Altyre. Она умерла в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Gordon nació aproximadamente 1503, en Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Alexander Gordon y Janet Grant. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Thomas Cumming of Altyre. Murió en Scotland.
